name: oodikone
description: An application for analyzing university data.

scripts.logs: docker compose --file docker-compose.yml logs backend frontend sis-updater-worker sis-updater-scheduler jami -f
scripts.logs:all: docker compose --file docker-compose.yml --profile oodikone --profile updater logs -f
scripts.logs:ci: docker compose --file docker-compose.ci.yml logs backend frontend sis-updater-worker sis-updater-scheduler jami
scripts.oodikone: npm run docker:down && ./run.sh oodikone anon up --detach
scripts.oodikone:test: npm run docker:down && docker compose --profile oodikone up --detach && docker compose --file docker-compose.test.yml up --detach
scripts.oodikone:ci: npm run docker:down && docker compose --file docker-compose.ci.yml --profile oodikone up
scripts.docker:down: ./run.sh both anon down --remove-orphans; ./run.sh both real down --remove-orphans
scripts.testupdater: docker compose --file docker-compose.ci.yml up --detach --no-recreate --wait sis-updater-worker && SCHEDULE_IMMEDIATE=weekly EXIT_AFTER_IMMEDIATES=yes docker compose --file docker-compose.ci.yml up sis-updater-scheduler --exit-code-from sis-updater-scheduler
scripts.install:local: npm i && npm i --prefix services/shared && npm i --prefix services/frontend && npm i --prefix services/backend && npm i --prefix updater/sis-updater-scheduler && npm i --prefix updater/sis-updater-worker
scripts.ci:local: npm ci && npm ci --prefix services/shared && npm ci --prefix services/frontend && npm ci --prefix services/backend && npm ci --prefix updater/sis-updater-scheduler && npm ci --prefix updater/sis-updater-worker
scripts.ci:docker: docker exec oodikone-frontend sh -lc "npm ci --prefix /opt/app-root/shared && npm ci" && docker exec oodikone-backend npm ci && docker exec oodikone-updater-scheduler npm ci && docker exec oodikone-updater-worker npm ci
scripts.ci:both: npm run ci:local && npm run ci:docker
